title: Koanophyllon plicata
intro: Koanophyllon plicata, a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, is a medicinal plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Koanophyllon plicata include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Koanophyllon plicata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly employed to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and inflammation.
